prompt.title: Custom Data Validation Rule
prompt.content: Always validate date ranges before querying data. Ensure start_date is before end_date.

prompt.title: Custom Aggregation Guideline
prompt.content: When aggregating sales data, always group by region first, then by product category.

prompt.title: Example Query Pattern
prompt.content: For trend analysis: Use rolling averages with a 7-day window for daily data, 4-week window for weekly data.
